title: B.Tech in Civil Engineering with Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning
content: B.Tech in Civil Engineering with Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning Department of Civil Engineering Programme Level Under Graduate Duration 4 Years Eligibility Fee Structure About the Programme Eligibility Minimum 50% marks in Physics, Chemistry & Mathematics (PCM) in Class XIIth. Students with a JEE-Mains / JEE-Advance/CUET / SAT (DI Code - 71057 ) score will be given preference in the merit list Fee Structure Duration 4 Years Tuition Fee (per annum) 1,60,000 Exam Fee (per annum) 20,000 Medical Insurance (Per Annum) 650 Caution Money (One Time Payment ) 2000 Student ID Card 1000 IMPORTANT LINKS Virtual Tour Blogs Admission Procedure Financial Aid & Loan Facilities Hostel Placements Download Brochure Admission Documents & Undertaking Apply Now Minimum 50% marks in Physics, Chemistry & Mathematics (PCM) in Class XIIth. Students with a JEE-Mains / JEE-Advance/CUET / SAT (DI Code - 71057 ) score will be given preference in the merit list APPLY NOW
